HYPNOSISCREATOR-SM_FETISH_ORB.title: SM
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SM_FETISH_ORB.descriptio: Fetish: SM. When an SM card is played on this enemy, they gain Doom (5% Max HP + 7, min 8; ×1.5 with Bog).
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DS_FETISH_ORB.title: DomSub
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DS_FETISH_ORB.descriptio: Fetish: DomSub. When a DomSub card is played on this enemy, they gain Doom (5% Max HP + 7, min 8; ×1.5 with Bog).
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DS_FETISH_ORB.flavor: A cue for dominance and submission.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TRANCE_FETISH_ORB.title: Trance
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TRANCE_FETISH_ORB.descri: Fetish: Trance. Whenever Trance is applied, they gain Doom (5% Max HP + 7, min 8; ×1.5 with Bog).
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TRANCE_FETISH_ORB.flavor: A soft fall away from waking thought.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_FETISH_ORB.desc: Fetish: Abnormal. When an Abnormal card is played on this enemy, they gain Doom (5% Max HP + 7, min 8; ×1.5 with Bog).
